query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime low-angle view of a dense downtown skyline featuring a prominent illuminated skyscraper with a brightly lit crown at center, surrounded by other high-rise buildings with glowing windows. Dark palm tree silhouettes stand in the foreground, and low clouds above reflect the warm ambient glow of city lights against the dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime low-angle view of a dense downtown skyline featuring a prominent illuminated skyscraper with a brightly lit crown at center, surrounded by other high-rise buildings with glowing windows, with dark palm tree silhouettes in the foreground. The scene is suffused with a sickly orange sodium-vapor cast that blankets the clouds and building facades in an unnatural amber hue, creating an unhealthy, contaminated urban atmosphere.
